creator: paiva@unifesp.br
text:
I thought  ${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/mx/TextTools/__init__.py was included in
${PORTSDIR}/lang/py-mx-base , thus the prior would not be needed if the later was satisfied.
This worked on 3 BSD systems in my lab, but that may work if my PYTHON_SITELIBDIR already contained the mx/TextTools

As I was not able to test this, I am sending a new patch, with the BUILD_DEPENDS corrected.
This patch replaces the previously submitted patches.
